description: Build baseline verification and cleanup: delete all 4 placeholder.cpp files, remove them from CMakeLists, rewrite SecurityEngine to properly delegate to Scanner and CryptoUtils, confirm build still passes
steps: Verify none of these are referenced in their respective CMakeLists.txt files (they should not be listed since they contain empty namespace bodies, but confirm)

Rewrite src/security/src/SecurityEngine.cpp to properly delegate scanFile() to the Scanner module's ScanEngine (use src/scanner/include/scanner/ScanEngine.h) instead of returning stub true. scanMemory should use ProcessMonitor from EDR. quarantine should use QuarantineManager from scanner. getThreats should maintain an internal threat list. getThreatById should query that list.
Update src/security/include/security/SecurityEngine.h to add necessary members (shared_ptr to ScanEngine, QuarantineManager, etc.)
Update src/security/CMakeLists.txt to link against threatone_scanner and threatone_edr
Rebuild and run all tests to confirm 1053+ tests still pass
acceptance_criteria: SecurityEngine no longer returns hardcoded stubs - it delegates to real Scanner/EDR modules
